hero.title: A digital stablecoin wallet for everyone
hero.subtitle1: Manage your money using the latest technology — stablecoins. Send, receive, and exchange in seconds.

features.f1Desc: Send or receive stablecoins in seconds
features.f2Desc: Exchange back and forth from standard euros and dollars
features.f3Desc: Set up consensus and multi-approval rules
features.f5Desc: Pay directly with a card from your stablecoin balance

advantages.title: Advantages
advantages.row1Subtext: Stablecoin transactions are significantly faster and cheaper than traditional bank transfers, especially for cross-border operations. You can send and receive stable currencies to anywhere in the world, at any time.
advantages.row2Subtext: Onchain wallets give you full control over your funds. No one can block, move, or hold them. They cannot be frozen by institutions, governments, or third parties. With our infrastructure, behind the scenes, you acquire such a wallet, controlled entirely through your email.
advantages.row3Subtext: Anyone with an internet connection can use decentralized finance without needing approval or a bank account, ensuring financial freedom. Traditional banking institutions are eliminated, reducing the risk of censorship and service disruption. You can generate returns through lending, staking, and providing liquidity.

imageSection.heading: DeFi yield without the complexity, banks, or intermediaries.

aboutCarousel.title: How it works
aboutCarousel.card1Desc: When you register for the first time with email, a non-custodial wallet is automatically created for you. You have full control to transfer it. We have no access to your funds.
aboutCarousel.card2Desc: We provide a service through infrastructure and a user interface that communicates with decentralized smart contracts onchain. Anyone can interact with the contracts directly as well.
aboutCarousel.card3Desc: Our service removes the barriers to decentralized finance. We provide access to participate in various protocols without needing technical knowledge.
aboutCarousel.card4Desc: We sponsor your transactions when you send stablecoins or use our decentralized finance hub. We simplify the process without compromising security.

faq.title: Questions?
faq.a1: Defied is a platform that provides non-custodial decentralized infrastructure for easy access to DeFi. Register with an email and automatically receive a wallet.
faq.a2: Only you. The smart contracts are non-custodial — neither Defied nor Privy have access to your private key. It is stored locally on your device.
faq.a3: Your funds are deposited into curated DeFi protocols with high liquidity through our smart contracts. Yield comes directly from the protocol, without an intermediary.
faq.q4: What are the advantages over a bank?
faq.a4: Full transparency through public smart contracts, higher yield from DeFi protocols, no intermediary, and full control over your assets at all times.
faq.q5: Can I withdraw my money at any time?
faq.a5: Yes — there is no lock-up period on our part. Withdrawal depends only on the liquidity of the respective decentralized protocol.
faq.a6: You can buy stablecoins directly on the platform with a debit/credit card, Apple Pay, Google Pay, or SEPA bank transfer — through our licensed partner MoonPay.

about.heroTitle: We created the first crypto savings product in Bulgaria
about.missionDark: Defied provides non-custodial infrastructure for easy access to decentralized finance.
about.missionLight: Our mission is to make access to decentralized finance easy.
about.blueSection: Defied allows users to create an account on the platform without needing to understand what a digital wallet and private key are in the blockchain context.
about.detailP1: Defied provides decentralized smart contract infrastructure for generating yield through leading DeFi protocols. The smart contracts are non-custodial — Defied has no access to user funds stored in them.
about.detailP2: Defied offers an intuitive user interface through which users can deposit funds in the form of stablecoins into curated decentralized protocols. Defied covers transaction costs for users (gas fees).
about.detailP3: Users can easily buy crypto or stablecoins with a debit/credit card, Apple Pay, Google Pay, or via SEPA bank transfer.
about.advantagesHeading: No technical knowledge needed. Quick crypto purchase. Curated protocols with high yield. Full control over your assets.
about.advantagesP1: You don't need to understand how digital wallets and private keys work. We offer an easy-to-use interface and registration with just an email address.
about.advantagesP2: We have no access to your funds. You are the only one who controls your wallet. All rules of interaction with DeFi protocols are encoded in smart contracts — public, verifiable, and immutable.
about.advantagesP3: We maintain a detailed knowledge base of materials, articles, and tutorials about the world of decentralized finance.

vaultDiamond.title: Diamond wstETH
vaultDiamond.athPaused: ATH reached! Deposits are paused - withdraw fee-free.
